# Tarkify

> AI-Powered Automation — Build, deploy, and scale intelligent AI agents.

Tarkify builds autonomous AI agents that automate work and make life easier. We help businesses reclaim hours of manual work and scale their teams through intelligent workflow orchestration.

## Products & Solutions

- [DevBeast](https://tarkify.qzz.io/solutions/devbeast): A local-first DevOps control plane that gives developers structural visibility and high-speed control over their entire development stack — containers, databases, and services — in a single pane of glass.
- [BizOps](https://tarkify.qzz.io/solutions/bizops): A unified platform that connects your entire business stack, automates cross-functional workflows, and provides real-time operational intelligence.
- [Legal Redline](https://tarkify.qzz.io/solutions/legal-redline): AI-powered contract review and redlining tool that automatically flags risk, suggests compliant clauses, and accelerates negotiations. (Coming Soon)
